## Summary

<!-- 1-2 sentences on what this PR does and why -->

## Type of change

<!-- check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature (skill / command / agent / adapter)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests / fixtures
- [ ] `chore` — build / tooling / CI / dependency updates

## Framework impact

<!-- if this PR touches the framework itself (PATTERNS, ADRs, DoD, etc.) -->

- [ ] Adds or modifies an ADR — link: `templates/docs/ADR/NNNN-*.md`
- [ ] Updates `templates/docs/PATTERNS.md.tmpl` — cites which ADR
- [ ] Updates `templates/docs/DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md.tmpl` — cites which ADR
- [ ] Adds a new automated gate (lint, schema, boundary rule)
- [ ] Adds a new stack recipe under `recipes/`
- [ ] Updates a standards mapping (NIST SSDF / ISO 25010)

## Triggering finding

<!-- link the Framework Finding issue this PR addresses, if any -->

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] If a new ADR: index updated at `templates/docs/ADR/README.md.tmpl`
- [ ] If a framework-impacting change: triggering retrospective entry
      added to `templates/docs/FRAMEWORK_CHANGELOG.md.tmpl`
